summary: 6 film announcements, 8 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: The Long Kiss Goodnight
film.announcement: Geena Davis expressed interest in making a sequel to the 1996 action film, stating it's her favorite project.

film.title: Austin Powers 4
film.announcement: Mike Myers confirmed that a fourth Austin Powers film is in development and will happen.

film.title: FlySquad – First Strike!
film.announcement: Cher and Bob Geldof are in talks to voice characters in the animated feature film.

film.title: Zeta
film.announcement: Zeta sequel is among local titles set for Prime Video Spain's 2027 slate.

film.title: Dímelo 3
film.announcement: Mercedes Ron's Dímelo 3 is among local titles set for Prime Video Spain's 2027 slate.

film.title: Steps
film.talent: Nikki Glaser, Ali Wong, Amanda Seyfried
film.announcement: Nikki Glaser has joined the Netflix animated fairy tale film alongside Ali Wong and Amanda Seyfried.

tv.title: Bridge & Tunnel
tv.announcement: Comedian Des Bishop's special 'Bridge & Tunnel' has set a release date on Hulu.

tv.title: Exit Right
tv.talent: Susan Sarandon, Kim Coates, Roberta Colindrez, Amy Sedaris, Ethan Slater, Christopher Jackson
tv.announcement: The Susan Sarandon drama series wrapped production with a significant ensemble cast including Amy Sedaris and Ethan Slater.

tv.title: Survival of the Thickest
tv.announcement: The series unveiled a trailer for its third and final season.

tv.title: The Westies
tv.announcement: The J.K. Simmons-led crime drama dropped its official trailer with creator Chris Brancato teasing details about season one.

tv.title: Prison Break
tv.announcement: Prison Break reboot is in development at Hulu with star Lukas Gage teasing a darker, grittier approach to the property.

tv.title: One Night in Idaho: The College Murders
tv.announcement: The true crime series has been renewed for season two at Amazon with new testimony featured.

tv.title: The Paris-Tokyo Job
tv.announcement: Studiocanal has set a true crime art heist docuseries in development and will launch at Sunny Side of the Doc.

tv.title: Love Story: John F. Kennedy Jr. and Carolyn Bessette
tv.announcement: Constance Zimmer stars in the television special exploring the lives and love story of JFK Jr. and Carolyn Bessette.
